decision_commentary: Bid comparison matrix contains two bids with all required fields: contractor name, total, line_items (5 scope categories each), timeline, and notes. Constructora Horizonte Los Cabos: $192,000 / 11 months. Grupo Constructor del Pacifico: $198,000 / 12 months. Recommendation is Constructora Horizonte Los Cabos with rationale going beyond lowest price — track record (12 years coastal), timeline (11 months), both bids confirming scope is viable within budget. Both bids are below the $200K client budget — confirms redesigned scope is correct. recommendation_rationale is specific and multi-criteria. No auto-fail conditions triggered. State_sync scored 3 per simulated run note.
celia_routing_notes: Confirmed via dg-11.json — Celia approved Horizonte recommendation.
